JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARE, DEREK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EQUIFAX, INC. $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $184.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,684.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $1500 FOR THE REASONS STATED IN THE ATTACHED MEMORANDUM.
